sections.paragraph:
σαρόω (later form for σαίρω via σάρον; censured by Phryn., see Lob.) 1 aor. ἐσάρωσα. Pass.: 1 aor. ἐσαρώθην; pf. ptc. σεσαρωμένος to sweep by using a broom, sweep (so Artem. 2, 33; Apollon. Dysc. p. 253, 7; Geopon. 14, 6, 5; PGiss 11, 19 [II a.d.]) τὶ someth. Lk 15:8. Pass. (cp. Sb 8000, 17 [III a.d.] συνσαρωθῆναι καὶ ῥανθῆναι τὸν οἶκον) Mt 12:44; Lk 11:25: Hs 9, 10, 2. Abs. Hs 9, 10, 3 (Leutzsch, Hermas p. 487 n. 313).—B. 580. DELG s.v. 1 σαίρω.

Phryn Phryn , the Atticist, signifying his Eclogae, II a.d.—List 5

Lob. Lob. = CLobeck, s. Phryn.—List 5

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pf. = perfect

ptc. ptc. = participle

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Geopon Geopon , a collection of older material, X a.d.—List 5

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

someth. someth. = something

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Leutzsch, Leutzsch, Hermas = MLeutzsch, Hirt des Hermas—Lists 1 (s. H), 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 916
